Hello, reader!

15 Sep 2021 - me

Hi! Welcome to my blog. Hopefully by the time you’ve found this post there are many more to accompany it.

I didn’t really foresee myself writing a blog, but I’m following a Jekyll tutorial (the technology this website is built on) and blogging is a major reason why Jekyll exists.

Knowing markdown definitely makes formatting a blog easier. You might see some tests in this section surrounding this post.
